lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Git back ter work, ye young varmint! There's treasure in them walls, and it's not gonna mine itself while ye stand here yappin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I mine here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Git ahold of yer pickaxe, find a vein of ore, and set to work. If ye got a bit of skill, ye'll have a pocket o' pay- dirt in no time.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: I've built me a contraption to wash the pay-dirt. Just drop yer pay-dirt in the hopper, an' wait fer it at the other end.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: I won't charge ye fer usin' my contraption, but ye'd better fix it yerself when it breaks. A good whack with a hammer usually settles it.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Now will ye be gettin' to work now, or are ye gonna keep yappin' like a doggone galoot?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to trade?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: If ye've found yerself some golden nuggets in this 'ere mine, I'll do you a swap, yeah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Why, I'm Percy. Prospector Percy, the roughest, toughest, gruffest miner in the land. I've been pannin' fer gold since I were a young-un, and here's where I've struck it lucky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, but what language are you speaking?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Don't ye give me any of yer lip, ye dern varmint! Young'uns these days got no respect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do go on.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: This here's the richest seam of ore I've found in all my days. After I built a contraption for washing the pay- dirt, the dwarves let me run things down here.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Now, have ye any more idjit questions, or are ye ready to do some real work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You discovered this mine?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: This here's the richest seam of ore I've found in all my days. After I built a contraption for washing the pay- dirt, the dwarves let me run things down here.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Now, have ye any more idjit questions, or are ye ready to do some real work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Let me have a think...

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: If ye've got level 57 Mining, ye could pay to use my restricted mine, up the ladder. 100 nuggets gives unlimited access.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: How would ye like it if the sack were bigger? I'll let ye have more ore in there if ye pays me 200 nuggets.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: I can give ye access to a special hopper in the restricted mine for 50 nuggets, but you'll need access to the restricted mine first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy access to the restricted mine, please.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Right, ye can go up there whenever ye likes. Just behave yerself, or my Ma will tan yer hide.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Ye'll need level 57 Mining first. An' don't think ye can fool me with yer potions and fancy stat-boosts. Get yer level up for real.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: That'll be 100 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to get the bigger sack, please.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: That'll be 200 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Ye can already climb the ladder to the restricted mine. But how would ye like it if the sack were bigger? I'll let ye have more ore in there if ye pays me 200 nuggets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to get the bigger sack, please.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: That'll be 200 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: I can give ye access to a special hopper in the restricted mine for 50 nuggets, it connects to the hopper down here.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Ye can now use that fancy new hopper in the restricted mine.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Well, now, I think ye've got everything already. Ye can already go climb the ladder to the restricted mine, ye've got the bigger sack capacity too and ye have access to that restricted hopper.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: That'll be 50 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else I can unlock here?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Well, now, I think ye've got everything already. Ye can already go climb the ladder to the restricted mine, and ye've got the bigger sack capacity too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you alone.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Dern straight ye will.

sections.title: Entering eastern dark tunnel without diary completion

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Oi, git yerself out of that hole! It's not safe in there.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: We got us a jammed wheel!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Ye'd better fix that wheel!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Git yer hammer an' fix that wheel!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: That water ain't flowing!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Both them wheels be jammed!

lines.speaker: Prospector Percy
lines.text: Git yer hammer an' fix them wheels!
